title: Reforge & Recycle
description: Recycle old tools and armor into something new!
body:
Welcome to Reforge & Recycle, a mod where you can turn your old, half broken and useless iron tools into something new!


You know how when you smelt an iron tool or armor, you get a measly 1 iron nugget?
Well no more, now when you blast the tools and armor instead, you get a new item called "Scrap Metal"

With this newly found scrap metal, you can either recycle it by putting it into a smoker to get a full iron ingot back instead of just one iron nugget
or, you can craft it into completely new tools, these tools are slightly better and stronger than normal iron tools!

This gives a reason to use a previously unknown and useless feature and rewards you for it!
Now get to Reforging & Recycling!
